name: Saint's Fried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a paper bag, combine flour, cayenne, garlic powder, and onion powder. Shake to mix.
2. Place corn flakes in a pie plate and crush them slightly by hand.
3. Wash chicken thoroughly and let it sit in the sink to drain excess water.
4. Pour olive oil into a large skillet and place over medium-high heat.
5. Dip 3 chicken thighs at a time into the flour mixture, shaking off any excess.
6. Remove chicken from the bag and dip each piece in beaten eggs to coat thoroughly.
7. Roll coated chicken pieces in crushed corn flakes until evenly coated.
8. Place skin side down in the skillet.
9. When the chicken just begins to brown on one side, reduce heat to medium-low.
10. Fry for 30 minutes, turning as needed to prevent burning.
11. Drain excess oil onto a large paper towel-lined plate.
